sections.title: 一、判断下列句子中画线部分的发音是(T)否(F)相同
sections.instruction: 判断下列句子中画线部分的发音是(T)否(F)相同。

questions.prompt: The <u>z</u>ebra is in the <u>z</u>oo.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 z 在 zebra 和 zoo 中的发音。两词中的 z 均发音为浊齿龈擦音 /z/，发音相同。

questions.prompt: It's time to li<u>s</u>ten to mu<u>s</u>ic.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 s 在 listen 和 music 中的发音。listen 中的 s 发音为 /s/，而 music 中的 s 发音为 /z/，两者发音不同。

questions.prompt: I g<u>o</u> t<u>o</u> a basketball club.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 o 在 go 和 to 中的发音。go 中的 o 发音为双元音 /əʊ/，而 to 中的 o 发音为单元音 /uː/，两者发音不同。

questions.prompt: This snowman h<u>a</u>s got <u>a</u>rms.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 a 在 has 和 arms 中的发音。has 中的 a 发音为梅花音 /æ/，而 arms 中的 a 发音为长元音 /ɑː/，两者发音不同。

questions.prompt: <u>S</u>ally likes <u>s</u>kating on ice.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 s 在 Sally 和 skating 中的发音。两词中的首字母 s 均发音为清齿龈擦音 /s/，发音相同。

questions.prompt: We <u>g</u>o there to see the <u>g</u>iraffes.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 g 在 go 和 giraffes 中的发音。go 中的 g 发音为浊软腭塞音 /ɡ/，而 giraffes 中的 g 发音为浊腭龈塞擦音 /dʒ/，两者发音不同。

sections.title: 二、根据提示写出单词，补全句子或对话
sections.instruction: 根据提示写出单词，补全句子或对话。

questions.prompt: The elephant has got a long n_______.
questions.explanation: 根据句意“大象有一条长……”及首字母提示 n，可知应填名词 neck（脖子）。

questions.prompt: Mike goes to bed at nine o'clock in the e_______.
questions.translation: 麦克在晚上九点钟睡觉。
questions.explanation: 根据常识，晚上九点上床睡觉，in the evening 是表示“在晚上”的固定短语，首字母提示为 e，故填 evening。

questions.prompt: The t_______ is very strong. It likes eating meat.
questions.translation: 老虎非常强壮。它喜欢吃肉。
questions.explanation: 根据描述“非常强壮、喜欢吃肉”且首字母为 t 的动物，可知应填 tiger（老虎）。

questions.prompt: It's half past eleven. It's time to have l_______.
questions.translation: 现在是十一点半。是吃午饭的时间了。
questions.explanation: 十一点半（half past eleven）接近中午，是吃午饭的时间，且首字母为 l，故填 lunch（午饭）。

questions.prompt:
-What s_______ do you love?
-We love Chinese.
questions.translation:
-你喜爱什么科目？
-我们喜爱语文。
questions.explanation: 根据答语“We love Chinese”中的 Chinese（语文）可知，问句问的是什么学科/科目，首字母为 s，故填单数名词 subject（科目）。

questions.prompt:
-W_______ do you have English, Ella?
-I have English on Friday.
questions.translation:
-艾拉，你什么时候上英语课？
-我星期五上英语课。
questions.explanation: 根据答语“on Friday”（在星期五）可知是对时间进行提问，且首字母为 W，故填特殊疑问词 When。

sections.title: 三、给下列图片选择相应的句子或对话
sections.instruction: 给下列图片选择相应的句子或对话。
wordbank: She likes dancing in her free time.
He does his homework at six thirty.
-What afterschool club do you go to? -I go to the piano club.

questions.prompt: 我的耳朵能帮我听到声音。
questions.explanation: 耳朵（ears）的作用是听（hear），对应的英文句子为 My ears help me hear。

questions.prompt: 她空闲时间喜欢跳舞。
questions.answer: She likes dancing in her free time.
questions.explanation: 跳舞是 dancing，空闲时间是 in her free time，对应句子为 She likes dancing in her free time。

questions.prompt: 我星期天去游泳。
questions.explanation: 星期天是 Sunday，去游泳是 go swimming，对应句子为 I go swimming on Sunday。

questions.prompt: 他在六点半做家庭作业。
questions.answer: He does his homework at six thirty.
questions.translation: 他在六点半做家庭作业。
questions.explanation: 六点半是 six thirty，做作业是 does his homework，对应句子为 He does his homework at six thirty。

questions.prompt: ——你去什么课外俱乐部？ ——我去钢琴俱乐部。
questions.answer: -What afterschool club do you go to? -I go to the piano club.
questions.translation: ——你去什么课外俱乐部？——我去钢琴俱乐部。
questions.explanation: 课外俱乐部是 afterschool club，钢琴俱乐部是 piano club，对应对话为 -What afterschool club do you go to? -I go to the piano club。

sections.title: 四、你知道棕色大熊猫“七仔”吗？选择合适的选项补全介绍
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，选择合适的选项补全介绍。
sections.passage: Look! This is Qizai. He is a very special (特别的) [1]. Many pandas are black and [2]. But he's got a different colour. He is [3] and white. He likes eating [4] very much. He's so [5]. Many people come to [6] him every day.

questions.translation: Look! This is Qizai. He is a very special (特别的) panda.
questions.explanation: 七仔是一只特殊的“熊猫”，故填 panda。

questions.translation: Many pandas are black and white.
questions.explanation: 一般的熊猫都是黑白（black and white）相间的，故填 white。

questions.translation: But he's got a different colour. He is brown and white.
questions.explanation: 根据前句“他有着不一样的颜色”以及文章开头的“棕色大熊猫”，这里填 brown，代表他是棕白相间的。

questions.translation: He likes eating carrots very much.
questions.explanation: 此处需要填入喜欢吃的食物，词库中只有 carrots（胡萝卜）是食物名词，故填 carrots。
他非常“可爱”，用形容词 cute。

questions.translation: Many people come to visit him every day.
questions.explanation: 人们来看望/拜访他，come to do sth 结构中用动词原形 visit。

sections.title: 五、选择合适的选项补全对话
sections.instruction: Sam和Amy在参观三星堆博物馆。选择合适的选项补全对话。

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Look at this man's statue(雕像)!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: And he has got two very big hands!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Do you like this man's statue?

questions.explanation: Amy 在赞叹雕像，“He is so tall”符合情境。

questions.translation: 是的！他也戴着一顶帽子。
questions.explanation: 后文说“I like his hat.”（我喜欢他的帽子），前句应提到帽子，故选 He's got a hat, too.
Sam 提问“Do you like...?”，用一般疑问句回答“Yes, I do.”。
下句 Amy 回答时间“It's five forty-five.”，可知问句是问时间，故选 What time is it?
前句说肚子饿了且是 5:45，由此可知到了吃晚饭的时间了，故选 It's time for dinner.

sections.title: 六、阅读绘本，完成下列各题
sections.instruction: 阅读绘本，完成下列各题。
sections.passage: An old man comes to a village. He asks for some water and food, but the villagers refuse to share. A boy tells the old man that he can get water from the well. The old man decides to make 'stone soup' using stones. The villagers are curious. He says the soup is yummy and would be better with corn. The villagers start sharing their food: one has corn, others bring carrots, tomatoes, and meat. In the end, the soup is ready and they all share and enjoy it together.

questions.prompt:
根据绘本内容，按故事发展顺序给下列句子排序：
① People all like the soup.
② People put food in the soup.
③ The old man wants some water.
④ The old man puts stones in the soup.
questions.translation: 根据绘本内容，按故事发展顺序给下列句子排序...
questions.explanation: 故事顺序：1. 老人要水 (The old man wants some water) 2. 老人放石头煮汤 (The old man puts stones in the soup) 3. 人们往里加食物 (People put food in the soup) 4. 大家都很喜欢汤 (People all like the soup)。因此正确顺序为③-④-②-①。

questions.prompt: The word "water" means "______" and "soup" means "______".
questions.explanation: water 意为“水”，soup 意为“汤”，故选B。

questions.prompt: Why is the soup yummy?
options: Because the old man is good at cooking stone soup.
Because people all put some different foods in the soup.
questions.explanation: 汤之所以美味是因为村民们都把各自不同的食物放到了汤里（如胡萝卜、西红柿、肉等），而不是因为石头好吃，故选C。
